instruction: In Safari's privacy settings, {ACTION} the 'Ask websites not to track me' (Do Not Track) preference.
source: adapted:osworld:030eeff7-b492-4218-b312-701ec99ee0cc mode=port; OSWorld Chrome 'enable Do Not Track' is a generic browser-privacy toggle; maps to Safari com.apple.Safari SendDoNotTrackHTTPHeader read via Tier-A defaults

args: defaults write com.apple.Safari SendDoNotTrackHTTPHeader -bool {BASELINE}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
defaults write com.apple.Safari SendDoNotTrackHTTPHeader -bool {GOAL}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
